name: mineru-open-mcp
description: Parse PDFs, Word docs, PowerPoint files, spreadsheets, and images into Markdown using MinerU's document parsing API.
long_description: MinerU Open MCP connects any MCP-compatible AI client to MinerU's document parsing engine. Convert PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, JPG, PNG, and HTML files into clean Markdown (and optionally Word, HTML, or LaTeX with an API token). Flash mode works out of the box — free, no sign-up required, up to 20 pages / 10 MB per file. Provide a MinerU API token to unlock higher limits and additional output formats.

tools.name: parse_documents
tools.description: Convert PDF, Office, images, and public URLs to Markdown via the MinerU cloud API. Uploads content to mineru.net (do not use for data that must stay on-device); does not modify originals; may write .md under output_dir. Without MINERU_API_TOKEN: Flash mode—Markdown only, ≤20 pages and ≤10 MB per file, rate limits apply. With token: higher limits and optional formats. Use for extraction/layout preservation; use get_ocr_languages only to list OCR codes, not to convert files. Parameters: file_sources paths or {"source","pages"} for PDF ranges; language OCR codes; model "html" only if all sources are web page URLs.

tools.name: get_ocr_languages
tools.description: Return supported MinerU OCR/script codes (read-only, no uploads). Use before setting language on parse_documents. Do not use for file conversion—call parse_documents instead.

MINERU_API_TOKEN.title: MinerU API Token
MINERU_API_TOKEN.description: API token for full capability — higher page limits and extra output formats (Word, HTML, LaTeX). Leave empty to use free Flash mode (Markdown only, 20 pages / 10 MB per file). Get your token at https://mineru.net.

OUTPUT_DIR.title: Output Directory
OUTPUT_DIR.description: Local directory where parsed results are saved (used for batch parsing or oversized content). Defaults to ~/mineru-downloads if not set.
